# Description

# [PKT-JOB-009](task-0065): Job Cancellation

## Purpose

Handle job cancellation.

## Scope

- Cancellation logic
- Cleanup
- State updates

## Implementation

1. Implement cancellation
2. Add cleanup
3. Update state

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Cancellation works
2. Cleanup complete
3. State updated
